auth.registerSuccessPending: Registration successful! Your account is pending admin approval.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {length} characters
auth.passwordRequireUppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter
auth.passwordRequireLowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
auth.passwordRequireSpecial: Password must contain a special character
auth.passwordRecentlyUsed: This password was recently used. Please choose a different password
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least {length} characters
auth.password_require_uppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter
auth.password_require_lowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
auth.password_require_special: Password must contain a special character
auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to sign in to your account
auth.registerDescription: Enter your details to create your account
auth.verificationEmailSentTo: We've sent a verification code to
auth.accountActivated: Your account is activated. You can now log in.
auth.accountPendingApproval: Your account is pending admin approval. You'll be able to log in once approved.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a verification code
auth.resetPasswordEmailSentTo: We've sent a verification code to
auth.passwordResetSuccessMessage: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
auth.ssoOnlyMode: Password login is disabled. Please use SSO to sign in.
auth.ssoCallbackInactiveDescription: Your account is pending admin approval. Please try again later or contact your administrator.
auth.ssoCallbackFailedDescription: Please try again or contact your administrator.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.verificationTokenInvalid: Verification link is invalid or expired
auth.resetPasswordByLinkDescription: Enter your new password to complete the reset
auth.checkEmailForLink: Please check your email and click the verification link
auth.orEnterCodeManually: Or enter the verification code manually
auth.passwordExpiredDescription: Please change your password to continue
auth.forcePasswordChangeDescription: You must change your password before continuing
auth.passwordExpiringSoon: Your password will expire in {days} days
auth.twoFactorDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.totpSetupRequiredByAdmin: Your administrator requires you to set up two-factor authentication
auth.twoFactorRateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.
auth.setupStep1Description: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a verification code in addition to your password.
auth.setupStep2Description: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator, etc.)
auth.setupStep3Description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify the setup
auth.setupStep4Description: Save these backup codes in a safe place. You can use them to access your account if you lose your authenticator device.
auth.setupStep4Warning: Each backup code can only be used once.
auth.setupStep5Description: Two-factor authentication is now enabled for your account. You'll need to enter a code from your authenticator app when you log in.
